prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the source photo, create a dramatically enhanced macro-photography version of the same spider on the same mesh surface. Keep the spider's pose, orientation, and location on the woven grid consistent, but zoom in tightly so the spider fills most of the frame. Increase realism, sharpness, and detail: reveal the segmented legs, tiny hairs, joints, mottled brown-and-cream abdomen markings, and natural shadows. Make the mesh look like translucent white plastic or nylon strands with a clearly visible square weave, crisp highlights, and shallow macro depth. Preserve a realistic photographic look with natural lighting, no added objects, no text, no watermark, and no stylization beyond macro enhancement.
